name: inventor
description: Runs a patent-informed feature whitespace and collision-diligence playbook before coding agents pitch or build a 'new' feature.

interface.longDescription: Adds an always-on invention pipeline: product archaeology, failure-driven whitespace, invention cards, widening-ring prior-art search, patentability/FTO claim charts, and the §101/§102/§103/§112/FTO/detectability/strategic-value/license-strategy gates, ending in an explicit disposition and human-inventorship safeguard.
defaultPrompt: Use inventor to find patent-informed feature whitespace in this codebase.
Run collision diligence on this feature idea before we build it.
Is this actually new, or does it already exist somewhere in here?
